title: Registration of bonds; coupon bonds
doc_html:
§867.  Registration of bonds; coupon bonds

Provision may be made for the registration of any of the bonds in the name of the owner as to principal alone and also as to both principal and interest and for the issuance of new coupon bonds in exchange for bonds registered as to both principal and interest.
doc_text:
§867.  Registration of bonds; coupon bonds
Provision may be made for the registration of any of the bonds in the name of the owner as to principal alone and also as to both principal and interest and for the issuance of new coupon bonds in exchange for bonds registered as to both principal and interest.
